/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/my_game.dir/src/areaDamageSpell.cpp.o CMakeFiles/my_game.dir/src/cell.cpp.o CMakeFiles/my_game.dir/src/directDamageSpell.cpp.o CMakeFiles/my_game.dir/src/enemy.cpp.o CMakeFiles/my_game.dir/src/enemyTower.cpp.o CMakeFiles/my_game.dir/src/field.cpp.o CMakeFiles/my_game.dir/src/gameManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/my_game.dir/src/hand.cpp.o CMakeFiles/my_game.dir/src/player.cpp.o CMakeFiles/my_game.dir/src/trapSpell.cpp.o CMakeFiles/my_game.dir/src/game.cpp.o CMakeFiles/my_game.dir/src/main.cpp.o -o my_game  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsfml-graphics.so.2.6.1 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsfml-window.so.2.6.1 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsfml-system.so.2.6.1
